finding-001.description: IEnvironment interface with services injection pattern exists and supports extensibility
finding-001.relevantCode: export interface IEnvironment { services: { persistence: IPersistenceService }, context: { schemaName: string, location?: string } }
finding-001.recommendation: Extend IEnvironment with auth service: services.auth: IAuthService

finding-002.description: IPersistenceService interface pattern provides template for IAuthService design
finding-002.relevantCode: export interface IPersistenceService { saveCollection(...), loadCollection(...), saveEntity(...), loadEntity(...) }
finding-002.recommendation: Follow same interface pattern for IAuthService with signUp(), signIn(), signOut(), getCurrentSession(), onAuthStateChange()

finding-003.description: NullPersistence provides mock implementation pattern for testing
finding-003.relevantCode: export class NullPersistence implements IPersistenceService { private store = new Map<string, any>() ... }
finding-003.recommendation: Create MockAuthService for testing that implements IAuthService with in-memory session state

finding-004.description: React context provider pattern with useRef for stable store instance
finding-004.relevantCode: const storeRef = useRef<any>(null); if (!storeRef.current) { storeRef.current = createStore() }
finding-004.recommendation: Create AuthContext with similar pattern - stable Supabase client and auth store instance

finding-005.recommendation: Auth-dependent components should be wrapped in observer() to react to auth state changes

finding-006.description: No existing authentication infrastructure - need to create from scratch
finding-006.recommendation: Create new auth/ directory in state-api with types.ts, supabase.ts, mock.ts

finding-007.description: No route protection pattern - all routes are currently public
finding-007.recommendation: Create ProtectedRoute component wrapper for auth-required routes

finding-008.description: Custom hooks pattern for state access (useWavesmithStore, useSchemaPreview)
finding-008.relevantCode: export function useWavesmithStore<T = any>(): T { const store = useContext(StoreContext); if (!store) throw Error(...) }
finding-008.recommendation: Create useAuth() hook that returns { user, loading, error, signIn, signUp, signOut }

finding-009.description: Environment types test provides pattern for testing service injection
finding-009.relevantCode: const env: IEnvironment = { services: { persistence: new NullPersistence() }, context: { schemaName: 'TestSchema' } }
finding-009.recommendation: Follow this pattern for auth service tests with MockAuthService injection

finding-010.description: Supabase client initialization requires environment variables (SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)
finding-010.recommendation: Add .env.example with required vars; validate at app startup; fail gracefully if missing
